generated_oml:
instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab building serving as the physical asset for the digital twin"
    base:contains EnvironmentalSensor, OperationalSensor, BCSActuator, BCSController
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors monitoring environmental parameters such as temperature, humidity, and air quality"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance OperationalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors monitoring operational data including post-occupancy configurations and building system status"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OperationalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

instance OperationalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OperationalSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental sensor data from building"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance OperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational sensor data including post-occupancy configurations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OperationalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with device metadata for middleware integration, providing geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics of building components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTools, Ditto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for secure device connectivity and data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyConsumptionOptimizationService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and protocol adaptation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive visualization and 3D rendering"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tools for automated BIM transformation into runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyConsumptionOptimizationService, VisualComfortManagementService, NonVisualHealthEffectAnalysisService
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators in Building Control Systems for operational control of building systems"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers in Building Control Systems for operational control of building systems"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous real-time monitoring of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building simulation for scenario testing and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predictive analytics on building performance data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight, HealthEffectManagementInsight
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing energy consumption through predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing visual comfort through lighting and environmental adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for analyzing non-visual health effects of building environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthEffectManagementInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time interactive visualization of building systems using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live data streams from building sensors for monitoring purposes"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated outcomes for building performance under various conditions"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for optimizing energy consumption in building operations"
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis for visual comfort adjustments based on lighting and environmental data"
]

instance HealthEffectManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effect analysis for occupant well-being"
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building components for facility management"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin and sent to Building Control Systems (BCS) actuators via Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with no specific time intervals specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework orchestrating bidirectional data exchange between physical assets and modular services via standardized extension points."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases of the building lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural soundness."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange protocols."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperable with external systems via standardized extension points, but specific systems not detailed in the document."
]
